memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: dis+honor → 去掉荣誉 → 耻辱

disillusion → 戳破幻想泡泡

coreMeaning.en: the feeling of disappointment after illusions are shattered

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: disillusionment → 幻灭感

disinclination → 不倾向于做某事

coreMeaning.en: to cleanse from infection; to sterilize

memorySemantics.literal: dis(去除)+infect(感染)= 去除感染
memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: disinfect wounds → 消毒伤口
disinfectant spray → 消毒喷雾

coreMeaning.cn: 虚伪的；不诚实的；狡猾的

coreMeaning.en: machine or person that washes dishes

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: disinflationary pressure → 通缩压力

coreMeaning.en: a large pan for washing dishes
